summary: Verified new Mirror Lens enhancement features in Heartbound game (frontend only). All 6 requested test scenarios passed: (1) First-use tooltip appears on first M press with exact text 'Mirror Lens reveals what the heart is hiding.', dismiss button works, mirrorLensTooltipShown=true persists to localStorage (key 'heartbound.save.v1'), tooltip does NOT reappear after page reload + second activation. (2) mirror-overlay computed opacity transitions 0->1 when ON, 1->0 when OFF. (3) Visual confirmation via screenshot: 3 golden hidden labels ('Exhaustion', 'Loneliness', 'Unspoken grief') render above citizens in Phaser canvas when Mirror Lens is ON, plus 'MIRROR LENS · ON' badge at top-center. (4) mirror-lens-button HUD click toggles state; active styling includes border-amber-400/70 class. (5) /game/3 (Tara/Reluctant Hero): Mirror Lens activates correctly, 'Myth keeper' hidden label visible in Phaser canvas (screenshot confirmed). (6) Regression: start-game-button -> /character, enter-antara-button -> /map navigation flows still work.
critical_code_review_comments: GameScreen.jsx duplicates the mirror-toggle logic in two places (handleToggleMirror and the M-key handler useEffect). Both contain identical 'setMirrorActive((v) => ...) + tooltip check' logic. Extract into a single useCallback for DRY.

GameScreen.jsx is now ~360 LoC and growing — useDialogueSequencer (~85 LoC), tooltip logic, key handler, and Phaser event wiring could be extracted. Approaching the 700-LoC code-review threshold but still readable.

MirrorOverlay.jsx inlines a <style> block with @keyframes mirrorScan — every mount re-injects the styles into DOM. Consider moving to global CSS (index.css) to avoid duplicate keyframe definitions if the component remounts on chapter change.

Mirror Lens state is local React state (mirrorActive in GameScreen), so it correctly resets when navigating between chapters — the review_request note about React persisting mirror state across chapters is actually NOT true: mounting GameScreen for a new chapterId initializes mirrorActive=false. The Phaser scene picks up the new state cleanly. This is acceptable behavior but the spec note in the request was inaccurate; verified user must press M again on chapter switch (still works correctly).

useGameStore.js handles defaultState.mirrorLensTooltipShown correctly via load() spread merge (...defaultState, ...parsed) so existing users without the field get false by default. Good backward compatibility.
seed_data_creation: Used localStorage.clear() at start to ensure fresh first-use tooltip scenario. localStorage key: 'heartbound.save.v1'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Mirror Lens features working at https://threshold-awakens-1.preview.emergentagent.com. Verified via Playwright: opacity transitions, tooltip text/dismiss/persistence (localStorage 'heartbound.save.v1' field mirrorLensTooltipShown), button class toggle (border-amber-400/70), and visual confirmation of hidden Phaser labels (Exhaustion/Loneliness/Unspoken grief in Ch1, Myth keeper in Ch3). Chapter switching resets React mirrorActive state — user must press M again per chapter (acceptable). Screenshots saved to /tmp/ch1_mirror_on.png and /tmp/ch3_mirror_on.png show correct rendering. Note: the 'Mirror Lens · on' badge text renders uppercase due to Tailwind 'uppercase' class — match case-insensitively if asserting on innerText.
verified_flows: Fresh localStorage -> /game/1 -> dismiss narration -> press M: tooltip data-testid=mirror-tooltip appears with text 'Mirror Lens reveals what the heart is hiding.'
dismiss-mirror-tooltip button closes tooltip and persists mirrorLensTooltipShown=true
Page reload -> /game/1 -> press M: tooltip does NOT reappear (persistence verified)
mirror-overlay computed opacity = 0 when OFF, = 1 when ON
Phaser canvas renders 'Exhaustion' (citizen-a), 'Loneliness' (citizen-b), 'Unspoken grief' (citizen-c) golden hidden labels above NPCs (visual confirm)
Top-center 'MIRROR LENS · ON' badge inside mirror-overlay shown when active
mirror-lens-button click toggles state; active button has border-amber-400/70 class
/game/3 Tara scene: Mirror Lens reveals 'Myth keeper' hidden label (visual confirm)
Tooltip does NOT reappear on Ch3 (persistence works across chapters)
Regression: title -> start-game-button -> /character -> enter-antara-button -> /map still functional
